examples: When the motor stopped, the silence was almost deafening.

definitions.text: The act of refraining from speaking.
examples: "You have the right to silence," said the police officer.

definitions.text: Refraining from speaking, for purposes of prayer or meditation; especially, a form of worship practiced by the Society of Friends (Quakers) during meetings.
examples: During silence a message came to me that there was that of God in every person.
Can you silence the crowd, so we can start the show?

definitions.text: To repress the expression of something.
examples: Women, as well as children, have their thoughts or emotions routinely silenced.
